user.title: Personal account details
user.description: Enter the data from your utility bill. Authorization on mos.ru will be performed via a QR code in the next step.

qr.title: Authorization via QR code
qr.description:
Scan the QR code with the **mos.ru** or **Gosuslugi Moscow** app:

![QR code]({qr_url})

After scanning, authorization will complete automatically.

*If the QR code is not displayed, try refreshing the page.*

code.title: Login confirmation (2FA)
code.description:
Open the **mos.ru** or **Gosuslugi Moscow** app and tap **"Confirm login"**.

After tapping, you will receive a push notification with a 6-digit code — enter it below.

sensors.title: Reading sources
sensors.description: Specify the Home Assistant sensors to take readings from (must be in m³)

data.submit_day: Day of the month for auto-submission

progress.scanning:
Scan the QR code with the **mos.ru** or **Gosuslugi Moscow** app:

![QR code]({qr_url})

[Open QR code in a new tab]({qr_url})

Waiting for scan...

error.entity_not_found: Sensor not found in Home Assistant
error.wrong_unit: Sensor must return a value in m³
error.invalid_code: Invalid confirmation code. Please try again.

abort.session_expired: mos.ru session has expired, re-authorization is required
